title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/common to v0.57.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate logo banner](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | minor | `v0.56.1-0.20231116145922-4857e16ba481` -> `v0.57.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.57.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.57.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.56.0...v0.57.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v0.56.0 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1652](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1652)
-   Fix typo in comment by [@​c3d](https://togithub.com/c3d) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1653](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1653)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/image-spec to v1.1.0-rc5 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1655](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1655)
-   Fix specification of unix:///run by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1656](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1656)
-   libimage/layer_tree: if parent is empty and a manifest list then ignore check. by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1651](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1651)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.12.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1658](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1658)
-   Split up util package into pkg/password, pkg/copy, pkg/version by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1657](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1657)
-   Remove ActiveDestination method to move into podman by [@​cgiradkar](https://togithub.com/cgiradkar) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1640](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1640)
-   Default machine CPUs to Cores/2 by [@​ashley-cui](https://togithub.com/ashley-cui) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1659](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1659)
-   pkg/config: do NOT set StaticDir and VolumeDir by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1660](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1660)
-   Implement negated label match function by [@​jakecorrenti](https://togithub.com/jakecorrenti) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1661](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1661)
-   chore: import packages only once by [@​testwill](https://togithub.com/testwill) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1665](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1665)
-   CoC: fix email link by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1669](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1669)
-   libnetwork/cni: ignore ENOENT while reading networks by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1668](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1668)
-   Makefile, libimage: `test-unit` must cover `libimage/manifests_test.go`  by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1671](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1671)
-   Add support for vrf option on netavark by [@​MrSuicideParrot](https://togithub.com/MrSuicideParrot) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1673](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1673)
-   Update module github.com/onsi/gomega to v1.28.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1674](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1674)
-   libimage: implement `retry` logic for  `manifest push` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1666](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1666)
-   Add list members emails to the CoC by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1670](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1670)
-   Use MatchNegatedLabelFilter function for networks by [@​jakecorrenti](https://togithub.com/jakecorrenti) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1677](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1677)
-   pkg/subscriptions: add /etc/crypto-policies/config in fips mode by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1667](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1667)
-   Fix ID and Digest filters by [@​umohnani8](https://togithub.com/umohnani8) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1676](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1676)
-   Update github.com/opencontainers/runtime-tools digest to [`408c51e`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/commit/408c51e) by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1679](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1679)
-   URGENT: heal CI: fix codespell by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1682](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1682)
-   Update module github.com/docker/distribution to v2.8.3+incompatible by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1680](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1680)
-   Makefile: simplify unit tests by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1684](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1684)
-   POC: appendable string arrays in containers.conf by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1675](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1675)
-   containers.conf: add `privileged` field to containers table by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1683](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1683)
-   Update module golang.org/x/term to v0.13.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1688](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1688)
-   Update module golang.org/x/crypto to v0.14.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1686](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1686)
-   apparmor: fix parsing beta/alpha version by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1689](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1689)
-   Update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.4.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1685](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1685)
-   Update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.13.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1690](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1690)
-   Update module github.com/containerd/containerd to v1.7.7 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1691](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1691)
-   pkg/config: use empty default for db_backend by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1692](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1692)
-   Move platform code to its own directory by [@​umohnani8](https://togithub.com/umohnani8) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1693](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1693)
-   Update module golang.org/x/net to v0.17.0 \[SECURITY] by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1694](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1694)
-   libimage: add compat interfaces for the new platform subpackage by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1696](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1696)
